---
title: "News"
title-block: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 10
  feed: true
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-banner}
![](images/news.png){.page-banner-img alt="news"}
:::


::: {.content-summary}
Check out the latest news and major updates from our lab!
:::

---

<!-- Posts from the posts/ directory will be automatically displayed below -->
